name: Google Sheets MCP
description: Reads, writes, and formats Google Sheets data via MCP — manage sheets, run formulas, and collaborate on structured spreadsheet data in real time.

skills.name: Spreadsheet Read/Write
skills.description: Reads and writes cell data, rows, and ranges in Google Sheets with support for formatting and formula execution.

skills.name: Sheet Management
skills.description: Creates, renames, and deletes sheets within a Google Sheets document and manages sharing permissions.

skills.name: Formula Execution
skills.description: Runs spreadsheet formulas and retrieves computed values across cells and named ranges in real time.
